title: Redirect to My Accounts on User Limit Exceeded
story: As a product administrator, I want to be redirected back to my accounts page with a clear error message when I exceed the user limit, so that I understand the issue without seeing a raw error screen.
description: Improve the error handling for the plan-limit middleware when a user attempts to invite more users than their plan allows. Instead of showing a standalone error page, redirect the user back to the My Accounts page with an inline error message explaining that the user limit has been exceeded.
acceptance_criteria: Exceeding the user invitation limit redirects to /myaccounts with an error message
Error message clearly explains the user limit has been exceeded
No standalone error page or raw error is shown
ux_changes: Inline error message on the My Accounts page when the user limit is exceeded, instead of a standalone error screen.
middleware_changes: Plan-limit middleware updated to redirect to /myaccounts with a flash error message instead of rendering a separate error page.
comment_summary: Developer updated the middleware to redirect with an error message to the myaccounts page instead of showing a standalone error.
